title: pgstat — Fleet Overview
description: Tüm instance'larin tek ekranda saglik panosu. NOC/TV ekrani icin uygundur. Bir instance'a tikla → Instance Detail.

list.name: service_group
list.query: select distinct service_group from control.instance_inventory where service_group is not null order by 1
list.label: Service Group

list.name: instance_filter
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active and (service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or service_group is null) order by display_name
list.label: Instance (opsiyonel)

targets.rawSql: select count(*) as value from control.instance_inventory where is_active and (service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group))

select count(*) as value from ops.alert a join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where a.status = 'open' and a.severity = 'critical' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group)) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance_filter) or '$__all' in ($instance_filter))

select count(*) as value from ops.alert a join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where a.status = 'open' and a.severity = 'warning' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group)) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance_filter) or '$__all' in ($instance_filter))

select round(sum(d.xact_commit_delta + d.xact_rollback_delta)::numeric / nullif(extract(epoch from (max(d.sample_ts) - min(d.sample_ts))), 0), 1) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where d.sample_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group)) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance_filter) or '$__all' in ($instance_filter))

select count(*) as value from fact.pg_activity_snapshot a join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where a.snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and a.state = 'active' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group)) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance_filter) or '$__all' in ($instance_filter))

select coalesce(sum(w.period_wal_size_byte), 0) as value from fact.pg_wal_snapshot w join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = w.instance_pk where w.sample_ts > now() - interval '1 hour' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group)) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance_filter) or '$__all' in ($instance_filter))

panels.title: Instance Sağlık Tablosu — tıkla, detaya git
panels.description: Bir satıra tıklayınca Instance Detail dashboard'una geçer.

targets.rawSql: with active_conn as (select instance_pk, count(*) as conn_count from fact.pg_activity_snapshot where snapshot_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and state = 'active' group by instance_pk), tps as (select instance_pk, round(sum(xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta)::numeric / nullif(extract(epoch from (max(sample_ts) - min(sample_ts))), 0), 1) as tps_val from fact.pg_database_delta where sample_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' group by instance_pk), wal as (select instance_pk, sum(period_wal_size_byte) as wal_bytes from fact.pg_wal_snapshot where sample_ts > now() - interval '1 hour' group by instance_pk), cache as (select instance_pk, round(100.0 * sum(blks_hit_delta)::numeric / nullif(sum(blks_hit_delta + blks_read_delta), 0), 2) as cache_pct from fact.pg_database_delta where sample_ts > now() - interval '1 hour' group by instance_pk), alerts as (select instance_pk, count(*) as alert_count from ops.alert where status = 'open' group by instance_pk) select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, coalesce(i.service_group, '—') as group_name, i.host, coalesce(c.conn_count, 0) as "Aktif Bağlantı", coalesce(t.tps_val, 0) as "TPS (5dk)", coalesce(w.wal_bytes, 0) as "WAL (1h)", coalesce(ca.cache_pct, 0) as "Cache Hit %", coalesce(a.alert_count, 0) as "Açık Alert" from control.instance_inventory i left join active_conn c on c.instance_pk = i.instance_pk left join tps t on t.instance_pk = i.instance_pk left join wal w on w.instance_pk = i.instance_pk left join cache ca on ca.instance_pk = i.instance_pk left join alerts a on a.instance_pk = i.instance_pk where i.is_active and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group)) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance_filter) or '$__all' in ($instance_filter)) order by "Açık Alert" desc, i.display_name

select $__timeGroupAlias(d.sample_ts, $__interval), i.display_name as metric, sum(d.xact_commit_delta + d.xact_rollback_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$__interval'::interval), 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group)) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance_filter) or '$__all' in ($instance_filter)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

select $__timeGroupAlias(d.sample_ts, $__interval), i.display_name as metric, 100.0 * sum(d.blks_hit_delta) / nullif(sum(d.blks_hit_delta + d.blks_read_delta), 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group)) and (i.instance_pk in ($instance_filter) or '$__all' in ($instance_filter)) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

select a.severity, i.display_name as instance, a.alert_code, a.first_seen_at, a.occurrence_count, left(a.title, 100) as title from ops.alert a left join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = a.instance_pk where a.status = 'open' and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) order by case a.severity when 'critical' then 1 when 'error' then 2 when 'warning' then 3 else 4 end, a.first_seen_at desc limit 100
